wordplay_note: A tall chief who cannot lead his people out of the maze
card_description: Ben Tallchief (meaning "Tallchief = tall leader") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Maze of Death*. Colony leader on Delmak-O whose authority dissolves as colonists begin dying. Name note: A tall chief who cannot lead his people out of the maze. Leadership is meaningless when reality itself is hostile. First appears in *A Maze of Death*.

reference.brief: Colony leader on Delmak-O whose authority dissolves as colonists begin dying
reference.significance: Leadership is meaningless when reality itself is hostile
